case_title: TIM KELLEY CONSULTING, LLC VS. EDWARD YUEN

docket_entries.description: REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON 10/14/2025.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-21-2012, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT YUEN, EDWARD
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TIM KELLEY CONSULTING, LLC

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TIM KELLEY CONSULTING, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YUEN, EDWARD $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,060.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-08-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-08-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY KARA FORTINA--ASSOCIATE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

STIPULATION TO SET ASIDE JUDGMENT AND DISMISS UNDERLYING SMALL CLAIMS ACTION SIGNED BY BOTH THE PLAINTIFF(KARA FORTUNA FOR TIM KELLEY CONSULTING,LLC) & THE DEFENDANT(EDWARD YUEN) FORWARDED TO DEPT.506 FOR REVIEW.
ORDER GRANTING SET ASIDE OF JUDGMENT AND DISMISSAL OF SMALL CLAIMS ACTION. -JUDGE DONALD S MITCHELL
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY TIM KELLEY CONSULTING, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT YUEN, EDWARD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-08-2013 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-08-2013 - JUDGMENT.
